spell.spell-dimension.moon_shortsword.de: 在目标处留下法术云, 造成{damage}点伤害.
spell.spell-dimension.moon_greatsword.de: 在目标处留下法术云, 造成{damage}点伤害.
spell.spell-dimension.scythe_forlorn.des: 持续挥舞手中巨镰, 造成{damage}点伤害.
spell.spell-dimension.scythe_kayn.name: 镰舞
spell.spell-dimension.scythe_kayn.descri: 持续挥舞手中巨镰, 造成{damage}点伤害.
spell.spell-dimension.scythe_rhaast.name: 镰舞
spell.spell-dimension.scythe_rhaast.desc: 持续挥舞手中巨镰, 造成{damage}点伤害.
spell.spell-dimension.bloodthirster.name: 渴血
spell.spell-dimension.bloodthirster.desc: 蓄力后向前挥剑造成{damage}点近战伤害并回复{heal}点生命值.
spell.spell-dimension.featherlight.name: 羽轻
spell.spell-dimension.featherlight.descr: 获得短暂的迅捷和缓降效果.
spell.spell-dimension.crucible.name: 擎天
spell.spell-dimension.crucible.descripti: 横转巨剑两周, 造成{damage}点火焰法术伤害并使目标着火和缓速.
spell.spell-dimension.lich_bane.name: 妖斩
spell.spell-dimension.lich_bane.descript: 连续劈出多道剑斩, 造成{damage}点伤害, 当目标最大血量低于40时造成额外伤害.
spell.spell-dimension.dawnbreaker.name: 破晓
spell.spell-dimension.dawnbreaker.descri: 流星破晓, 冲击目标, 造成{damage}点伤害并使目标晕眩.
